---
title: Tools & Access
---

# 🛠️ Tools & Access

Set these up before your first day wraps up:

| Tool | What it's for | Get started |
|------|---------------|-------------|
| 📧 **Email** | Company communications | [Outlook](https://outlook.office.com) |
| 🔒 **VPN** | Secure remote access | [Cisco AnyConnect](https://www.cisco.com/c/en/us/products/security/anyconnect-secure-mobility-client/index.html) |
| 💬 **Chat** | Real-time messaging | [Slack](https://slack.com/get-started) |
| 🔑 **SSO Portal** | One login for everything | [Okta](https://www.okta.com) |
| 📁 **Cloud Drive** | File storage and sharing | [Google Drive](https://drive.google.com) |

> 🆘 **Need access to something not listed?** Reach out to IT Support
> or ask your onboarding buddy.
